abilities.Name: Colonial Legions
abilities.Effect: After the Battalion Combat step of the Asset Phase, target a Dropsite or Feature. If any enemy Battalions completely removed any friendly Battalions from that Dropsite or Feature, place 1 Battalion on that Dropsite or Feature.

abilities.Name: Intensify Point-Defence
abilities.Effect: At the end of the Planning Phase, pick one friendly Group. All Ships in that Group improve their Aegis-X value by 2 or gain Aegis-1 if they do not have the Aegis-X special rule.

abilities.Name: Infiltrate and Sabotage
abilities.Effect: At the end of the Planning Phase, pick one Dropsite within 6" of a friendly Group. That Dropsite takes D3+1 Core hits.

abilities.Name: Mass Driver Volley
abilities.Effect: When you assign a Group's weapons to a target, each of the attacking Group's Weapon Systems with "Mass Driver" in their name improve their Lock by 1 for that attack sequence.

abilities.Name: Atmospheric Bombing Run
abilities.Effect: At the start of the Asset Phase, target one friendly Wing of Bombers. That Wing gains the Bombardment special rule until the end of the round.

abilities.Name: Next-Gen Armour Plating
abilities.Effect: At the end of the Planning Phase, target one friendly Group. That Group may re-roll failed Energy Saves until the end of the round.

Abilities.Name: Dedicated Survey Teams
Abilities.Effect: When you activate a Group of a single Ship, that Ship may Survey a Dropsite and attack with a single weapon this round (but still cannot launch Assets).

Abilities.Name: Overcharge Lasers
Abilities.Effect: When you assign a Group's weapons to a target, pick one of the attacking Group's Weapon Systems with "Laser" in its name. That Weapon System gains Fusillade-2 for that attack sequence.

Abilities.Name: Push Engines to Max
Abilities.Effect: At the start of a friendly Group's activation, each Ship in it suffers 1 Damage and improves its Thrust by 2" until the end of its activation.
